title: Enchancementos
description: A enchancements addon adding some enchantments that fit the mod well
body:
# Enchancementos
Enchancementos is an addon for the popular Enchancement mod that adds 4 unique and powerful enchantments to Minecraft, expanding your gameplay possibilities with creative new mechanics!
##  Features
This mod adds 4 brand-new enchantments that seamlessly integrate with vanilla Minecraft and the Enchancement mod:

 **Burrow - Devastating crossbow enchantment**
 
 **Disrupt - Status effect remover for axes**
 
 **Glacial Stride - Water-freezing horse armor enchantment**
 
 **Temptation - Animal attraction for hoes and axes**


## Enchantment Details
**Burrow**
Type: Crossbow Enchantment
Max Level: III
Rarity: Rare
Transform your crossbow into a devastating weapon that fires prismarine shard projectiles with incredible piercing power!
Features:

Fires special prismarine shard projectiles instead of arrows
Piercing Power: Shoots through 4-6 entities depending on level (Pierce IV-VI equivalent)
High Damage: 1.5x to 2x damage multiplier (scales with level)
Armor Bypass: Deals 3-7.5 additional magic damage that ignores armor
Visual Effects: Glowing cyan projectiles with particle trails (glow, electric sparks, water droplets)
Immersive Sounds: Deep ocean-themed audio using Warden heartbeats, Guardian attacks, and Respawn Anchor sounds
Balanced: Costs extra durability for the powerful shot

How to Use:

Load your crossbow with prismarine shards instead of arrows
Fire to unleash a devastating piercing shot
Watch as it punches through multiple enemies!


**Disrupt**
Type: Axe Enchantment
Max Level: III
Rarity: Rare
Remove beneficial status effects from your enemies on hit! Perfect for PvP or fighting buffed mobs.
Features:

Effect Removal: Strips 1-3 positive effects per hit (based on level)
Smart Targeting: Prioritizes strongest effects (highest amplifier, then longest duration)
Protected Effects: Cannot remove beacon buffs or totem effects (balanced!)
Cooldown System: 6-second cooldown per target prevents spam
Visual Feedback: Purple witch particles and enchanted hit effects
Sound Effects: Enchantment table sounds on successful disruption

Protected Effects:

Beacon effects (Regeneration, Speed, Haste, Resistance, Jump Boost)
Totem of Undying effects (Fire Resistance, Absorption)

Perfect For:

PvP combat against potion users
Fighting buffed enemies
Challenging boss fights


**Glacial Stride**
Type: Horse Armor Enchantment
Max Level: II
Rarity: Rare
Let your horse walk on water by freezing it into frosted ice beneath their hooves!
Features:

Water Walking: Automatically converts water to frosted ice
Scaling Radius:

Level I: 3-block radius
Level II: 4-block radius


Temporary Ice: Uses frosted ice that melts after 60-120 seconds

**Temptation**
Type: Hoe/Axe Enchantment
Max Level: I
Rarity: Uncommon
Make animals follow you as if you were holding their favorite food - without actually needing the food!
Features:

Works on: Hoes and Axes
Range: 10-block radius
Automatic Following: Animals pathfind to you like you're holding wheat/carrots/etc.
No Food Required: Perfect for herding without wasting resources
Performance Friendly: Only checks every 0.5 seconds
Mature Animals Only: Babies and fully fed animals are not affected

Perfect For:

Moving animals around your farm
Herding without carrying food
Quick animal management

### this mod will be updated later on, thanks
